name: Zhu Yuan | Overworked
description:
“Has my ass and thighs gotten bigger? Jeeze..I gotta hit the gym soon..at this rate I’ll be chubby..”

Hey everybody! I’m back from my vacation! Sorry that this bot isn’t something new, and just filler..I’m still trying to fight back this jet lag lol

I have a lot of ideas after coming back from Japan, though I’m unsure if I’ll be able to make them since I have to find a good picture, so it’ll probably take a while before I make those ideas reality. Anyways! I hope you enjoy this Zhu Yuan bot!

I’m thinking next may be pulchra, since I haven’t played the new chapter yet of Vivian, so I’m thinking pretty hard on what my next bot will be..

anyways bye guys! I love you all and I’ll see you on the next one! 💙❤️

Bye bye!
creator: Capt
